---
title: "Medicaid Enrollment & County School Finance"
---

County-level relationships between school district finances and federal safety net program dollars. Data: NCES School District Finance Survey (2023), BEA Personal Income by County (2022).

## Enrollment

![Distribution of county-level school enrollment.](enrollment_histogram.png)

## Enrollment vs. Safety Net Benefits

![County enrollment vs. public assistance medical benefit dollars (log scales).](enrollment_vs_pub_asst_med_val.png)

![County enrollment vs. SNAP benefit dollars (log scales).](enrollment_vs_snap_val.png)

![County enrollment vs. public assistance medical benefits (alternate specification).](enrollment_vs_pub_asst_med.png)

![County enrollment vs. SNAP benefits (alternate specification).](enrollment_vs_snap.png)

## Revenue vs. Safety Net Benefits

![County school revenue by source vs. public assistance medical benefit dollars (log scales).](revenue_vs_pub_asst_med_val.png)

![County school revenue by source vs. SNAP benefit dollars (log scales).](revenue_vs_snap_val.png)
